title: lonicera periclymenum f. aurea
intro: Lonicera periclymenum f. aurea, also known as gold-flowered honeysuckle, is a variant of the common honeysuckle plant, characterized by its golden-yellow flowers. Traditionally, gold-flowered honeysuckle has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Gold-flowered honeysuckle can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to soothe coughs, calm anxiety, and promote relaxation.
